snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children.

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disclosureday/

Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

snippet.title: Souldia - Ni Dieu ni maître // Vidéoclip officiel
snippet.description:
« Il est l’heure de briser nos chaines! À quoi bon faire de la musique sans la liberté d’expression? Fondamentalement, le rap est un genre musical qui dénonce et il est important de ne pas en oublier l’essence même. Je ne serai pas le pion sur l’échiquier, je serai la voix des oppressés et la main de fer du peuple. Crier haut et fort ce que tout le monde pense tout bas pour défendre les opprimés face aux injustices que nous impose la société actuelle. » - Souldia 

Ni Dieu ni maître, nouveau single disponible partout : https://linktr.ee/souldia 

Appel à l'unisson le 13 juillet 2026 sur les Plaines d'Abraham, à l'occasion de ma carte blanche au FEQ pour le show de ma vie!!! Je serai précédé de Koriass, FouKi et Sensei H : https://www.feq.ca/fr/artistes/souldia

Production : Disques 7ième Ciel
Production exécutive / A&R : Steve Jolin

Réalisation : Christophe Martin
Co-réalisation : Kevin St-Laurent

Artwork : Étienne Bossé / Bosslab Design

----------

PAROLES // Ni Dieu ni maître

Comment sourire 
Avec un masque 
Comment vous dire 
De ne pas vous cacher la face 
Comment se souvenir 
Si vous effacez nos traces 
Au moins ils pourront dire
Qu’on n’aura pas manqué d’audace 

Faut travailler 
Métro, boulot, dodo 
Pour mieux s’exténuer
Pour payer les factures 
Et pour mieux s’oublier 
Un salaire de misère 
Pour un fils d’ouvrier 
Parce que la vie sera moins triste seulement si vous souriez 

Soyons patients
Le jour viendra peut-être en réessayant 
Les années passent et plus l’homme devient fainéant
Battons-nous contre souffrance, contre déchéance 
Et si on le peut 

Soyons heureux 
Un peu moins tristes
Soyons ensemble 
Soyons de ceux qui prennent les risques 
Soyons rêveurs, un peu surréalistes 
Et si on le peut
Soyons amoureux 

Soyons unis 
Soyons uniques 
On fait du bruit 
Et on laisse parler la musique 
Soyons de ceux qui agissent et qui parlent peu 
Au nom de tous ces malheureux 
Pendus sur la place publique
Mais donnons-nous la peine 
De descendre dans la rue prendre part à la manifestation 
Rendez-nous les histoires qui nous appartiennent 
Rendez-nous les enfants des Premières Nations 
Simple citoyen prisonnier du système 
Libérez de prison tous nos paternels 
Donnez-vous la peine de venir côtoyer la misère humaine dans nos HLM 

Je sais 
C’est pas facile à entendre tout ça c’est vrai 
Alors je chante, je chante tout c’que j’ai vu de près 
Soyons soudés 
Soyons solidaires et nombreux 
Et si on le peut 

Soyons heureux 
Un peu moins tristes
Soyons ensemble 
Soyons de ceux qui prennent les risques 
Soyons rêveurs, un peu surréalistes 
Et si on le peut
Soyons amoureux 

Soyons heureux
Soyons heureux

Soyons anarchistes au lieu d’être matérialistes 
Soyons généreux un jour ça reviendra peut-être 
Laisse-moi me rendre utile dans ma petite vie d’artiste 
Soyons nous-même et nous n’aurons ni Dieu, ni maître 

Ni Dieu, ni maître

Ni Dieu, ni maître
Ni Dieu, ni maître

Ni Dieu, ni maître
Ni Dieu, ni maître
Ni Dieu
Ni Dieu
Ni Dieu, ni maître

----------

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Beyond the Hive Update | Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Darktide's new, free update Beyond the Hive, will see you traversing the vast, uncharted wilderness of Atoma Prime. The update releases March 17.

Beyond the Hive brings a wealth of new content to Darktide:

- New game mode Expeditions: Venture beyond the confines of Hive Tertium and find out what horrors await you outside its walls.
- New enemies: Ogryn Pack Master & Armoured Pox Hounds
- More firepower: Decimate packs of heretics with the Modified Grenade or call an artillery strike to obliterate a whole horde or try one of the other alternatives.
Environmental threats: The environment is as toxic and deadly as the chaos that infects it. With twisters, lightning storms and a polluted atmosphere.
- New earnable cosmetics: Complete penances to earn all new cosmetics.

Learn more about the new game mode in the Expeditions Vision & Game Design dev blog:
https://fatshark.games/25JDkq


Learn more about Darktide on our official website:
► https://fatshark.games/HdwS01

Subscribe to our newsletter
► https://fatshark.games/rzGOql

Follow our Darktide socials
► https://fatshark.games/N8eiJB
